top_signals.title: Hertz Stock Drops a Record 41% on Profit Warning, Funding Plan
top_signals.summary: Hertz Global Holdings Inc. stock plunged the most since its initial public offering five years ago after the car renter warned of pressure on earnings and plans to issue new debt.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Identity theft victims face 'unconscionable' IRS delays, report says
top_signals.summary: Victims currently face wait times of almost two years to resolve their cases, according to the National Taxpayer Advocate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Micron stock jumps 16% as soaring prices from memory crunch lead to quadrupling of revenue
top_signals.summary: Micron's quarterly earnings report follows a 700% surge in the memory maker's stock price over the past year.

top_signals.title: Treasure Hunt – Nova Scotia: Canada’s first mining frontier
top_signals.summary: Long before prospectors flooded the Klondike, Nova Scotia was already mining.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
